_comment: The degenerate `default -> *` policy — the explicit, conformant replacement for the DEPRECATED --debug-open-grants flag (v7.74 §6.9a.4; removed v7.75). Every authenticating identity receives a wide-open admin grant covering both the local namespace (bare *) and any peer's namespace (/*/*). Use ONLY to drive the validate-peer grant-gated surface; NEVER a production default.
